step_rationale: Gut-microbiota-derived metabolites; regulate blood pressure and systemic inflammation via GPR signaling independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Short-chain fatty acids generated by dysbiotic microbiota act as GPR agonists to modulate blood-pressure and systemic-inflammatory MI risk.

references.title: Microbial Peer Pressure: The Role of the Gut Microbiota in Hypertension and Its Complications.
